titleStmt.title: SII 36.149: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 149. (A.R. No. 149 of 1910.) VEḶḶALŪR, COIMBATORE TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT. On the fifth pillar in the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Tēṉīśvara temple.

summary.p: Damaged at the end. Gift of gold for lighting 20 lamps by Uḍaiyanāyagaṉ Tuṇaiyirundāṉ of Tañjāvūr-kūṟṟam, in Pāṇḍikulāsanivaḷanāḍu which was a subdivision of Chōḻa-maṇḍalam to the temple of Tēṉūr Āṇḍār at Veḷḷalūr in Pērūr-nāḍu. The two śiva-brāhmaṇas of the temple agreed to maintain lamps in the temple during the tiruppaḷḷieḻuchchi ceremony for thirty days.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī vikki
ramacoḻatevarkku yāṇ
ṭu 3 Āvatu perūr nāṭṭu
veḷḷalūr Āḷuṭaiyār
teṉūrāṇṭār koyiṟ
kāṇi Uṭaiya civappirā
maṇaṉ Irācātittaṉ ka
ṇṭa māttāṇṭāṉāṉa vī
racoḻa māmuṉiyu pañcaneti I
rācacekaraṉ Uṭaiyapiḷḷai
yāṉa vīracoḻa paṭṭaṉum I
vviruvom coḻa maṇṭala
ttup pāṇṭi kulācaṉi va
ḷanāṭṭut tañcāvūr kū
ṟṟattu kaṇṇaṅkuṭai
yāṉ Uṭaiya nāyakan tu
ṇaiyiruntāṉ pakkal ko
ṇṭu kaṭava Orupatu mā It
takkai pon Aiṅkaḻañca
rai Ip pon Aiṅ kaḻañca
raikkum Upaiyamāka Inā
manāyanār koyilukkut
tiruppaḷḷi Eḻuccikku nāḷ
ḷonṟukku Irupatu tiru
viḷakku muppatu vaṭṭamum
vaḻuvāmey Erippomā
kavum Ivai Erikkumiṭat
tu Ikkoyilil kāṇi U
ḷḷārāy kuṭamuṅ kucciyuṅ ko
ṇṭu pukkān Iyāvanno
ruvan Intat tiruviḷakku Iru
patum Oru nāḷ viḻunāḷ paṭā
mai Erippomākavum Ivai
Erikkumiṭattu Eṅkaḷ coṟ
ṟuṇṇappomākavum Ippaṭi
ācantirātittavarai mākki
kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom vīraco
ḻa māmuṉiyum vīracoḻa paṭṭaṉu
m
Digital edition of SII 36.149 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
